response.step_by_step_log: The video is a promotional video for the 'hololive 7th fes. Ridin' on Dreams' event. The background track throughout the video is the theme song of the same name. I identified the song title as 'Ridin' on Dreams' and the artist as 'hololive IDOL PROJECT' from the on-screen text and search results. The song is in Japanese. I performed a search for 'Ridin' on Dreams hololive IDOL PROJECT Japanese and English lyrics' to get the necessary lyrics. The video consists of a single song playing throughout with various visual segments featuring event information, illustrations, and artist messages.
response.global_summary: This is a promotional video for the 'hololive 7th fes. Ridin' on Dreams' event. It features the event theme song 'Ridin' on Dreams' by hololive IDOL PROJECT playing in the background throughout the video, accompanied by visuals of event information, illustrations, and fan messages.

scenes.description: The theme song 'Ridin' on Dreams' by hololive IDOL PROJECT plays in the background. The visuals consist of various promotional posters, fan messages, event information, and highlights from past hololive fes events.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
ねえ、君がいたからだよ
ねえ、ありがとうを何度も
今すぐに伝えたいんだ
さあ乗り込もう！
Ridin' on dreams, yeah!
